mapper.select:
SELECT l.log_id, l.phone, c.customer_name, l.operation_type, l.consume_value, l.remain_value, l.video_group_name, l.create_time FROM batch_computing_power_log l LEFT JOIN batch_customer c ON l.phone = c.phone AND c.del_flag = 0 WHERE 1 = 1
AND DATE(l.create_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(l.create_time) <= #{endDate} ORDER BY l.create_time DESC

SELECT l.log_id, l.phone, c.customer_name, l.video_group_name, l.generate_count, l.status, l.create_time FROM batch_video_generate_log l LEFT JOIN batch_customer c ON l.phone = c.phone AND c.del_flag = 0 WHERE 1 = 1
AND DATE(l.create_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(l.create_time) <= #{endDate} ORDER BY l.create_time DESC

SELECT s.stat_id, s.phone, c.customer_name, c.customer_type, s.scan_count, s.download_count, s.register_count, s.stat_date FROM batch_qr_code_stat s LEFT JOIN batch_customer c ON s.phone = c.phone AND c.del_flag = 0 WHERE 1 = 1
AND s.stat_date >= #{startDate} AND s.stat_date <= #{endDate} ORDER BY s.stat_date DESC, s.stat_id DESC

SELECT DATE(create_time) AS stat_date, COUNT(*) AS total FROM batch_customer WHERE del_flag = 0 AND (branch_phone = #{branchPhone} OR phone = #{branchPhone}) AND DATE(create_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(create_time) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY stat_date ASC

SELECT DATE(l.create_time) AS stat_date, COALESCE(SUM(l.consume_value), 0) AS total FROM batch_computing_power_log l LEFT JOIN batch_customer c ON l.phone = c.phone AND c.del_flag = 0 WHERE 1 = 1
AND DATE(l.create_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(l.create_time) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(l.create_time) ORDER BY stat_date ASC

SELECT DATE(l.create_time) AS stat_date, COALESCE(SUM(l.generate_count), 0) AS total FROM batch_video_generate_log l LEFT JOIN batch_customer c ON l.phone = c.phone AND c.del_flag = 0 WHERE l.status = 0
AND DATE(l.create_time) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(l.create_time) <= #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(l.create_time) ORDER BY stat_date ASC

SELECT s.stat_date, COALESCE(SUM(s.scan_count), 0) AS total FROM batch_qr_code_stat s LEFT JOIN batch_customer c ON s.phone = c.phone AND c.del_flag = 0 WHERE 1 = 1
AND s.stat_date >= #{startDate} AND s.stat_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY s.stat_date ORDER BY s.stat_date ASC

SELECT CASE customer_type WHEN 1 THEN '分公司' WHEN 2 THEN '服务商' WHEN 3 THEN '个人' ELSE '未知' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM batch_customer WHERE del_flag = 0 AND (branch_phone = #{branchPhone} OR phone = #{branchPhone}) GROUP BY customer_type
